title: ocimum tenuiflorum var. anisodorum
intro: Ocimum tenuiflorum var. anisodorum, also known as Anisodorum Tulsi, is a lesser-known variety of the Ocimum tenuiflorum plant, commonly referred to as Holy Basil. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Anisodorum Tulsi include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Anisodorum Tulsi is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
